footer.descripcion: Head-to-head tournaments and ELO rankings of the most iconic anime characters. Open source portfolio project by Diego Alegil.

newsletter.intro: Weekly digest with the top, new tournaments and featured predictions.
newsletter.okDefault: We've sent you a confirmation email.
newsletter.doubleOptIn: Double opt-in: you need to confirm via email. You can unsubscribe at any time from any newsletter footer.
newsletter.errorEnvio: Couldn't send. Try again in a few seconds.

hero.subtitulo: Head-to-head tournaments, visual brackets and live ELO rankings. Pick the champion of the next bracket.

torneos.subtitulo: Head-to-head brackets between catalog characters. Open any tournament to see the full roster and match status.
torneos.errorFallback: Try again in a few seconds.
torneos.vacio: No active tournaments yet. The auto-tournament cron runs every 3 days.

votar.subtituloPagina: Pick the winner of each matchup.

personajes.subtituloPagina: Full catalog with stats by anime.
